gaps.title: Hosted template lifecycle is present, but direct send-by-template is not clearly exposed in emails send
what_to_do: Use templates create/update/publish in the CLI as normal
For real hosted-template sends, inspect local emails send help
If the installed CLI still lacks template flags, fall back to MCP/API or render local HTML and use --html-file

gaps.title: Receiving/sending capability toggle is ambiguous after creation
what_to_do: Prefer setting --receiving at domains create time
If an existing domain needs receiving enabled, inspect local help
Be ready to fall back to MCP/API if domains update still lacks the toggle

gaps.title: Machine-mode JSON errors may be written to stderr
what_to_do: Preserve raw text channels in wrapper output

gaps.title: Listen commands are streams, not request/response calls
what_to_do: Treat output as NDJSON in JSON mode
Use timeouts or supervised process control
Do not block forever unless the user explicitly wants a stream

gaps.title: Transactional email help documents ISO timestamps; broadcasts explicitly support natural language
what_to_do: Prefer ISO 8601 for agent-generated transactional schedules
Natural language is fine for broadcast scheduling when that helps the user
